hero.title: Global Cross-border Barter Trade
hero.subtitle: China as the core trading hub, connecting global buyers and sellers. AI-assisted matching, pricing, and negotiation — reducing USD dependency and closing the trade fulfillment loop.

features.title: Six Core Capabilities
features.subtitle: AI drives every step from attraction to deal closure
features.f1Desc: Multilingual portal that draws global partners who want to trade with China
features.f2Desc: Enterprise profiles and product tags power real-time AI supply-demand matching
features.f3Desc: AI-assisted commodity pricing and cargo valuation to reduce information asymmetry
features.f4Desc: Intelligent negotiation strategies auto-advance conversations to deal confirmation
features.f5Desc: Reduce USD dependency with RMB, multi-currency, and stablecoin settlement options
features.f6Desc: Orders, contracts, documents, and supply chain finance — all in one integrated platform

howItWorks.title: Three Steps to Global Trade
howItWorks.s1Desc: Complete enterprise verification, build your trade profile, gain global visibility
howItWorks.s2Desc: Post products or procurement needs — AI generates your profile and recommends matches
howItWorks.s3Desc: AI advances negotiations, generates quotes, signs contracts, and completes settlement

roles.title: Who Is This For
roles.r1Desc: Expand export channels and connect with global buyers
roles.r2Desc: Enter the China market and find reliable partners
roles.r3Desc: Source quality Chinese products with simplified cross-border processes
roles.r4Desc: Broker multi-party deals with full platform support

cta.title: Join IBC AI Trade OS Today
cta.subtitle: Step into the next era of AI-powered global trade

footer.powered: Powered by IBC AI Trade OS
